description_long: This rifle features a modern tactical design with a prominent rail system along the top, suitable for mounting various accessories. It is equipped with a vertical foregrip beneath the handguard for improved handling and stability. The rear of the rifle has a skeletonized stock, which reduces weight while maintaining structural integrity. A compact optical sight is mounted on the upper rail, enhancing target acquisition. The magazine is positioned in front of the trigger guard, and the barrel is relatively short, making it suitable for urban environments. The entire rifle is rendered in a uniform dark color, giving it a sleek and utilitarian appearance.
description: A modern tactical rifle with a skeletonized stock, vertical foregrip, and mounted optical sight, all in a dark finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the skeletonized stock, vertical foregrip, and mounted sight.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel end, vertical foregrip, and the compact width of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the rail system, sight, and stock, mirroring the features seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Top-down view emphasizing the rail system, sight placement, and overall slim profile.
